questions.question: Dress Making ke liye sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Body measurements lena

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi garment ko banane se pehle, sahi body measurements lena sabse important step hai taaki fit accha ho.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'Seam Allowance' kya hota hai?

options.A: Fabric ka extra hissa jo hem ke liye chhodte hain
options.B: Pattern ke edges se stitch line tak ki doori
options.C: Garment ko loose karne ke liye extra fabric
options.D: Design mein use hone wala extra fabric

questions.explanation: Seam allowance woh extra fabric hota hai jo pattern ke cutting edge aur actual stitch line ke beech chhoda jaata hai, taaki silai ke liye jagah mile.

questions.question: Ek achhe tailor ke liye kaun sa skill sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Fabric dyeing

questions.explanation: Precision in measurements (mapon mein sahi hona) ek achhe tailor ke liye sabse important skill hai taaki garment perfect fit ho.

questions.question: Garment construction mein 'Grainline' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Fabric ka colour decide karta hai
options.B: Garment ki drape aur fit ko affect karta hai
options.C: Fabric ki cost kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Grainline fabric ke warp (lambe dhaage) aur weft (chaudhe dhaage) ki direction ko darshata hai, jo garment ki drape aur fit par seedha asar dalta hai.

questions.question: Tailoring shop mein safety ke liye kya precautions lena chahiye?

options.B: Sharp tools ko open chhod dena
options.C: Machine ko off karna jab use na kar rahe hon
options.D: Oil floor par faila rehne dena

questions.explanation: Machine ko use na karte waqt off karna electrical accidents se bachne ke liye zaroori hai. Loose kapde aur open sharp tools dangerous ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek professional tailor ko apne customers ke saath kaise deal karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf order lena aur kaam karna
options.B: Unki requirements ko samajhna aur advice dena
options.C: Unko apni pasand ke design choose karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Customer ki requirements ko samajhna aur sahi advice dena ek professional tailor ke liye customer satisfaction ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Draping' technique ka use kisme kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Pattern ko mannequin par directly create karne mein
options.C: Silai machine ko thread karne mein

questions.explanation: Draping ek method hai jisme fabric ko directly mannequin par drape karke pattern banaya jaata hai, jisse garment ka flow aur fit better samajh aata hai.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'Finishing' se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Silai ke baad garment ko press karna aur details add karna

questions.explanation: Finishing mein garment ko press karna, loose dhaage kaatna, buttons, buttonholes, aur anya embellishments lagana shamil hai, jo garment ko complete look dete hain.

questions.question: Ek 'Dart' ka primary purpose kya hota hai garment construction mein?

options.B: Flat fabric ko body curves ke according shape dena

questions.explanation: Darts flat fabric se extra fullness ko remove karke garment ko body ke natural curves ke according shape dene ke liye use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'Alteration' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Existing garment ke fit ya style mein changes karna
options.C: Fabric ko naye colour mein dye karna

questions.explanation: Alteration ka matlab hai kisi bane hue garment ko customer ke body type ya pasand ke according adjust karna.

questions.question: Body measurements lete waqt 'Bust' measurement kahan se liya jaata hai?

options.B: Sabse poore hisse se chest ke around
options.C: Kamar ke sabse patle hisse se
options.D: Hip ke sabse poore hisse se

questions.explanation: Bust measurement chest ke sabse poore hisse se, arms ke neeche se aur back ke around liya jaata hai.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'Pressing' kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Fabric ko naya dikhane ke liye
options.B: Silai ko smooth aur professional dikhane ke liye
options.C: Garment ko shrink karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko stretch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Pressing silai ke har stage par ki jaati hai taaki seams flat aur neat dikhen, aur garment ko ek professional finish mile.

questions.question: Ek tailor ko 'fabric shrinkage' ke baare mein pata hona kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki woh fabric ko zyada price par bech sake
options.B: Taki garment dhone ke baad chhota na ho jaaye
options.C: Taki silai machine kharab na ho
options.D: Taki fabric ka colour na nikle

questions.explanation: Fabric shrinkage ka pata hona zaroori hai taaki garment banane se pehle fabric ko pre-shrink kiya ja sake, jisse garment dhone ke baad chhota na ho.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'Interfacing' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Fabric ko extra support aur stiffness dena
options.C: Fabric ko doosre fabric se jodna

questions.explanation: Interfacing ek material hai jo fabric ko collar, cuffs, waistbands jaise areas mein extra support, stiffness aur shape dene ke liye lagaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar customer 'loose fit' garment chahta hai, toh aap measurements mein kya karenge?

options.B: Measurements se thoda extra allowance denge

questions.explanation: Loose fit ke liye, basic measurements se thoda extra allowance dena zaroori hai, taaki garment body par chipka hua na lage.

questions.question: Tailoring mein 'Notches' ka kya kaam hai pattern par?

options.A: Fabric ko cut karne ke liye guide
options.B: Pattern pieces ko sahi tarah se align karne mein help karna

questions.explanation: Notches pattern pieces par chhote marks hote hain jo silai karte waqt matching points ko align karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Tailoring ke basic course mein 'Hand Embroidery' sikhana kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki machine kharab hone par kaam ruk na jaaye
options.B: Taki garment mein artistic value add ki ja sake
options.C: Taki fabric ko mazboot kiya ja sake
options.D: Taki customer ko zyada charge kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Hand embroidery basic course mein optional ho sakti hai, lekin yeh garment mein ek unique aur artistic touch add karti hai, jisse uski value badhti hai. Basic course mein focus construction par hota hai, but embellishment ki understanding bhi helpful hai.

questions.question: Body measurements lene ke liye sabse zaroori tool kaun sa hai?

options.B: Measuring tape

questions.explanation: Measuring tape (maapne wala feeta) body measurements lene ke liye sabse basic aur essential tool hai.

questions.question: Fabric cutting ke liye kaun sa tool sabse best hai?

options.B: Pinking shears

questions.explanation: Fabric shears ya kapde ki kainchi specially fabric cutting ke liye design ki jaati hai, jisse clean aur precise cuts milte hain.

questions.question: Silai machine mein 'Bobbin' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Lower thread ko pakadna

questions.explanation: Bobbin machine ke neeche wale hisse mein hota hai aur lower thread ko hold karta hai jo upper thread ke saath milkar stitch banata hai.

questions.question: Fabric par marking ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Tailor's chalk

questions.explanation: Tailor's chalk fabric par temporary markings karne ke liye use hota hai, jo baad mein aasani se hataye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Silai machine ki 'Needle' ko kab change karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab woh mud jaaye ya dull ho jaaye

questions.explanation: Needle ko tab change karna chahiye jab woh mud jaaye, dull ho jaaye ya toot jaaye, taaki stitches clean aur fabric damage na ho.

questions.question: 'Seam Ripper' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Galat silai ko kholne ke liye
options.D: Pattern ko trace karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Seam ripper ek chhote tool hai jo galat silai ko aasani se kholne ke liye use hota hai, bina fabric ko damage kiye.

questions.question: Ironing board par 'Padding' kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki heat evenly distribute ho aur fabric ko support mile

questions.explanation: Padding heat ko evenly distribute karta hai aur fabric ko ek soft, supportive surface provide karta hai, jisse wrinkle-free results milte hain.

questions.question: Silai machine mein 'Tension Dial' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Needle ki position adjust karna
options.C: Upper aur lower thread ki tightness adjust karna

questions.explanation: Tension dial upper aur lower thread ki tightness ko adjust karta hai taaki stitches balanced aur evenly banein.

questions.question: Fabric ko hold karne aur pieces ko temporary attach karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Stapler

questions.explanation: Sewing pins fabric pieces ko temporary hold karne ke liye use kiye jaate hain, taaki silai karte waqt woh apni jagah par rahen.

questions.question: Agar silai machine ka 'foot pedal' kaam nahi kar raha, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Machine ki needle

questions.explanation: Agar foot pedal kaam nahi kar raha, toh sabse pehle power connection aur pedal ki cable ko check karna chahiye ki woh sahi se plugged in hain ya nahi.

questions.question: Fabric edges ko 'zigzag stitch' se finish karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Fabric fraying (dhaage nikalne) se bachta hai

questions.explanation: Zigzag stitch fabric edges ko fraying (dhaage nikalne) se rokta hai, jo ki ek common seam finishing technique hai.

questions.question: Kon sa tool buttonholes banane ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Pinking shears

questions.explanation: Most modern sewing machines mein buttonhole foot attachment hota hai jo automatic ya semi-automatic buttonholes banane mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Silai machine ko 'clean' karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki woh smooth chale aur uski life badhe
options.D: Taki usme zyada oil na lage

questions.explanation: Machine ko regular clean karne se usme jama hua lint aur dust nikal jaata hai, jisse woh smooth chalti hai aur uski life badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Thimble' ka kya use hai hand sewing mein?

options.B: Ungli ko needle chubhne se bachana

questions.explanation: Thimble ek chhota cap hota hai jo ungli par pehna jaata hai taaki needle chubhne se bacha ja sake, especially jab thick fabric mein silai kar rahe hon.

questions.question: Agar silai machine se 'skipped stitches' aa rahe hain, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Needle dull ya galat lagi hai

questions.explanation: Skipped stitches ka ek common reason dull, bent ya galat size/type ki needle ka hona hai. Needle ko check aur change karna chahiye.

questions.question: Fabric ko 'straight' cut karne ke liye kaun sa tool helpful hai, especially lambe cuts ke liye?

options.B: Rotary cutter aur cutting mat

questions.explanation: Rotary cutter aur cutting mat lambe aur straight cuts ke liye bahut efficient hote hain, especially quilting aur garment making mein.

questions.question: Silai machine mein 'Presser Foot' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Fabric ko needle ke neeche flat aur firm hold karna

questions.explanation: Presser foot fabric ko needle ke neeche flat aur firm hold karta hai, jisse fabric feed hota hai aur stitches evenly bante hain.

questions.question: 'Cotton' fabric ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Breathable aur absorbent hota hai

questions.explanation: Cotton fabric breathable hota hai (hawaar-paar ho sakti hai) aur moisture ko absorb karta hai, isliye garmiyon mein comfortable hota hai.

questions.question: 'Silk' fabric ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Smooth, shiny aur soft hota hai

questions.explanation: Silk uski smoothness, natural sheen aur soft drape ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Warp' aur 'Weft' threads fabric mein kya denote karte hain?

options.B: Fabric ki lambai aur chaudai ke dhaage

questions.explanation: Warp threads fabric ki lambai mein hote hain aur weft threads chaudai mein hote hain, jo ek doosre se bun kar fabric banate hain.

questions.question: Kon sa fabric 'natural fiber' nahi hai?

options.B: Wool

questions.explanation: Nylon ek synthetic fiber hai jo petroleum se banaya jaata hai, jabki Linen, Wool aur Jute natural fibers hain.

questions.question: Garment cutting se pehle fabric ko 'Pre-shrinking' kyu karte hain?

options.A: Taki fabric ka colour na nikle
options.B: Taki dhone ke baad garment chhota na ho
options.C: Taki fabric ko press karna aasan ho

questions.explanation: Pre-shrinking karne se fabric apni maximum shrinkage achieve kar leta hai, jisse garment banane ke baad dhone par woh chhota nahi hota.

questions.question: 'Bias' cut fabric ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Bahut zyada stretch aur drape deta hai
options.C: Sirf straight lines mein cut hota hai

questions.explanation: Bias cut fabric ko grainline se 45 degree ke angle par kaatna hota hai, jisse fabric mein natural stretch aur beautiful drape aata hai.

questions.question: Kon sa fabric 'winter wear' ke liye accha hai?

options.B: Cotton lawn

questions.explanation: Wool apni warmth aur insulating properties ke liye jaana jaata hai, isliye winter wear ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Fabric ke 'Right Side' aur 'Wrong Side' ko pehchanne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Silai karne mein aasani hoti hai
options.B: Garment ko professional look dene ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko fold karne mein help karta hai

questions.explanation: Right aur Wrong side ki pehchan karne se garment ki finishing acchi aati hai aur woh professional dikhta hai. Isse silai mein galti hone ke chances kam hote hain.

questions.question: 'Denim' fabric kis tarah ka weave hai?

options.B: Satin weave

questions.explanation: Denim ek classic twill weave fabric hai, jisme diagonal rib pattern hota hai jo usko uski strength aur durability deta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko 'flowy' aur 'drapey' dress banani hai, toh kaun sa fabric choose karenge?

options.B: Brocade

questions.explanation: Chiffon aur Georgette jaise lightweight fabrics mein acchi drape hoti hai, jo flowy dresses ke liye perfect hain.

questions.question: Fabric ko 'Grainline' ke hisaab se cut karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki garment ki shape aur drape sahi rahe
options.C: Taki silai machine kharab na ho

questions.explanation: Grainline ke according cutting karne se garment ki shape, drape aur fit sahi rehti hai, aur woh twist ya sag nahi karta.

questions.question: Kon sa fabric 'synthetic' hai aur 'wrinkle-resistant' hota hai?

options.B: Rayon

questions.explanation: Polyester ek synthetic fabric hai jo apni wrinkle-resistance aur durability ke liye jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Lining' ka kya purpose hota hai garment mein?

options.B: Garment ko andar se clean finish dena aur drape improve karna

questions.explanation: Lining garment ko andar se clean finish deti hai, uski drape ko improve karti hai aur usko wear karne mein comfortable banati hai.

questions.question: Ek 'knit fabric' ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Loops se bana hota hai aur stretchable hota hai
options.C: Sirf straight lines mein cut hota hai

questions.explanation: Knit fabric interlocking loops of yarn se banaya jaata hai, jiske karan usme inherent stretch hota hai, jo woven fabric mein nahi hota.

questions.question: Fabric ke 'nap' (direction of pile) ko cut karte waqt kyu dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Taki fabric ki cost kam ho
options.B: Taki garment ka colour na badle
options.C: Taki garment ka shade aur texture consistent rahe
options.D: Taki silai machine par zyada load na pade

questions.explanation: Nap wale fabrics (jaise velvet, corduroy) ko hamesha ek hi direction mein cut karna chahiye, warna garment ke alag-alag parts ka shade aur texture alag dikh sakta hai.

questions.question: Fabric ko 'selvage edge' ke saath cut karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Selvage edge ko use karke garment ko decorate kiya ja sake
options.B: Selvage edge fabric ki true crosswise grain ko darshata hai
options.C: Selvage edge fabric ko fray hone se bachata hai aur grainline maintain karta hai
options.D: Selvage edge se fabric ko fold karna aasan hota hai

questions.explanation: Selvage edge fabric ka finished edge hota hai jo fray nahi hota aur fabric ki true lengthwise grainline ko maintain karta hai, jo cutting ke liye reference point hota hai.

questions.question: 'Running Stitch' ka use kisme kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Temporary joining ya gathering ke liye

questions.explanation: Running stitch ek basic hand stitch hai jo temporary joining, basting ya light gathering ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Sabse common aur versatile machine stitch kaun sa hai?

options.B: Buttonhole stitch

questions.explanation: Straight stitch sabse common aur versatile machine stitch hai, jo almost har garment construction ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: 'Backstitch' hand sewing mein kyu use hota hai?

options.B: Ek mazboot aur durable seam banane ke liye
options.C: Fabric edges ko finish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Backstitch hand sewing ka sabse mazboot stitch hai, jo machine stitch jaisa strength deta hai aur permanent seams ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: 'Plain Seam' kya hoti hai?

options.A: Dono fabric edges ko fold karke silna
options.B: Do fabric pieces ko right sides together rakh kar seedhi silai karna
options.C: Ek edge ko doosre ke upar rakh kar silna

questions.explanation: Plain seam sabse basic seam hai, jisme do fabric pieces ko right sides together rakh kar ek seedhi silai ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Kon sa stitch 'stretchable fabrics' ke liye accha hai?

options.B: Zigzag stitch

questions.explanation: Zigzag stitch mein elasticity hoti hai, jo stretchable fabrics (jaise knits) ke liye ideal hai taaki seams stretch ho saken aur toot na jaayen.

questions.question: 'French Seam' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Fabric edges ko andar chhupa kar clean finish deti hai
options.D: Sirf decorative purpose ke liye hai

questions.explanation: French seam ek neat aur durable seam hai jo fabric ke raw edges ko andar chhupa deti hai, jisse garment ko ek clean aur professional finish milta hai.

questions.question: Silai shuru aur khatam karte waqt 'backstitching' kyu karte hain?

options.B: Taki silai mazboot ho aur khule nahi

questions.explanation: Backstitching silai ke shuru aur ant mein karne se stitches lock ho jaate hain aur seam khulti nahi hai, jisse woh mazboot banti hai.

questions.question: Kon sa seam finish 'fraying' ko rokne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Pinking shears se cut karna

questions.explanation: Pinking shears fabric edges ko zigzag pattern mein cut karte hain, jisse fraying kam hoti hai. Zigzag stitch bhi ek effective method hai.

questions.question: Agar silai machine 'puckering' kar rahi hai (fabric ko sikod rahi hai), toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Tension bahut tight hai ya needle dull hai
options.D: Bobbin thread khatam ho gaya hai

questions.explanation: Puckering aksar high tension, dull needle, ya galat stitch length ke karan hoti hai. Tension adjust karna ya needle change karna is problem ko theek kar sakta hai.

questions.question: 'Basting' ka kya matlab hai tailoring mein?

options.B: Temporary stitches se fabric pieces ko hold karna

questions.explanation: Basting, ya temporary stitching, fabric pieces ko ek saath hold karne ke liye use hota hai silai se pehle, jisse alignment sahi rahe.

questions.question: Kon sa stitch 'invisible hem' banane ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Zigzag stitch

questions.explanation: Blind hem stitch ek machine ya hand stitch hai jo garment ke right side se almost invisible hota hai, jo hems ke liye perfect hai.

questions.question: 'Flat-felled Seam' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Bahut mazboot aur durable seam jo dono sides se clean dikhe

questions.explanation: Flat-felled seam ek bahut mazboot aur durable seam hai jo jeans jaise garments mein use hoti hai. Isme raw edges andar chhup jaate hain aur seam flat dikhti hai.

questions.question: Agar upper thread loop kar raha hai (loose stitches), toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Upper thread tension

questions.explanation: Agar upper thread loop kar raha hai, toh iska matlab hai ki upper thread tension bahut kam hai ya machine theek se thread nahi ki gayi hai.

questions.question: 'Gathering' ka kya matlab hai tailoring mein?

options.B: Ek lambe fabric piece ko chhota karke fullness add karna

questions.explanation: Gathering ek technique hai jisme fabric ki lambai ko chhota karke usme fullness (pleats ya ruffles) add ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Machine stitching mein 'stitch length' adjust karne se kya hota hai?

options.B: Stitches bade ya chhote hote hain
options.D: Fabric ki motai adjust hoti hai

questions.explanation: Stitch length adjust karne se ek stitch se doosre stitch ke beech ki doori badhti ya kam hoti hai, jisse stitches bade ya chhote dikhte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa stitch 'decorative' purpose ke liye bhi use hota hai?

options.B: Running stitch

questions.explanation: Satin stitch ek embroidery stitch hai jo smooth, dense areas ko fill karne ke liye use hota hai aur decorative designs ke liye popular hai.

questions.question: Seam 'pressing' kyu zaroori hai silai ke dauran?

options.B: Taki seams flat aur neat dikhen

questions.explanation: Seams ko silai ke har stage par press karne se woh flat, crisp aur professional dikhti hain, jisse final garment ki finish acchi aati hai.

questions.question: 'Pattern' mein 'grainline arrow' kya indicate karta hai?

options.A: Fabric ko kis direction mein cut karna hai
options.B: Fabric ka colour

questions.explanation: Grainline arrow batata hai ki pattern piece ko fabric ke lengthwise grain (warp) ke parallel kaise align karna hai, jo garment ki drape aur fit ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Garment construction mein 'darts' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Flat fabric ko body curves ke according shape dena

questions.explanation: Darts fabric se extra fullness ko remove karke garment ko body ke natural contours (jaise bust, waist) par fit karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: 'Layout' ka kya matlab hai pattern making mein?

options.B: Pattern pieces ko fabric par arrange karna cutting se pehle

questions.explanation: Layout ka matlab hai pattern pieces ko fabric par efficiently arrange karna, taaki kam se kam fabric waste ho aur grainline sahi ho.

questions.question: Agar pattern mein 'lengthen/shorten line' hai, toh uska kya use hai?

options.B: Garment ki lambai ko adjust karna

questions.explanation: Lengthen/shorten line pattern par ek specific area hota hai jahan se garment ki lambai ko badhaya ya kam kiya ja sakta hai, bina overall shape ko bigade.

questions.question: 'Seam allowance' ko cut karne ke baad 'clip' kyu karte hain (especially curved seams par)?

options.B: Taki seam flat lay kare aur pull na kare

questions.explanation: Curved seams par seam allowance ko clip karne se fabric relax hota hai aur seam press karne ke baad flat aur smooth dikhti hai, pull nahi karti.

questions.question: 'Facing' ka kya use hai garment mein?

options.B: Necklines, armholes jaise edges ko clean finish dena

questions.explanation: Facing ek fabric piece hota hai jo garment ke edges (neckline, armhole) ko clean finish dene ke liye use hota hai, jisse raw edges chhup jaate hain.

questions.question: Pattern ko fabric par 'pin' karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Pins ko grainline ke parallel lagana chahiye
options.C: Pins ko fabric ke edge se bahut door lagana chahiye
options.D: Pins ko sirf corners par lagana chahiye

questions.explanation: Pins ko grainline ke parallel lagane se fabric stretch nahi hota aur pattern apni jagah par stable rehta hai.

questions.question: Garment construction mein 'understitching' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Facing ya lining ko roll hone se rokna

questions.explanation: Understitching ek stitch hai jo facing ya lining ko garment ke andar ki taraf roll hone se rokta hai, jisse edges clean aur crisp dikhte hain.

questions.question: Ek 'sleeve' ko bodice mein attach karte waqt kya step follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Sleeve ko seedha sil dena chahiye
options.B: Sleeve ko gather karke armhole mein fit karna chahiye
options.C: Sleeve ko pehle hem karna chahiye
options.D: Bodice ko pehle finish karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Sleeve ko bodice mein attach karte waqt, sleeve head ko lightly gather karke armhole ke curves ke according fit kiya jaata hai, jisse smooth set mile.

questions.question: Agar aapko 'waistband' attach karna hai, toh sabse pehle kya karenge?

options.B: Waistband ko fabric par cut karenge
options.C: Garment ki waistline ko finish karenge

questions.explanation: Waistband ko shape aur stiffness dene ke liye usme interfacing lagana ek important pehla step hai, taaki woh accha dikhe aur hold kare.

questions.question: Garment construction mein 'zipper' lagane ka sabse common method kaun sa hai?

options.B: Invisible zipper

questions.explanation: Centered zipper (ya slot zipper) sabse common method hai jisme zipper ke teeth seam ke center mein chhup jaate hain.

questions.question: Pattern par 'fold line' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Wahan se pattern ko cut karna hai
options.B: Wahan se fabric ko fold karna hai aur pattern ko us fold par place karna hai
options.C: Wahan se fabric ko gather karna hai
options.D: Wahan se seam allowance add karna hai

questions.explanation: Fold line ka matlab hai ki pattern piece ko fabric ke folded edge par place karna hai, jisse cutting ke baad ek continuous piece bane (e.g., bodice front).

questions.question: Ek 'collar' ko attach karne se pehle kya steps follow karte hain?

options.B: Collar ko interfacing lagate hain aur uske edges stitch karte hain
options.D: Collar ko directly neckline par pin karte hain

questions.explanation: Collar ko attach karne se pehle usme interfacing lagaya jaata hai taaki woh shape maintain kare, aur uske outer edges ko stitch karke trim aur turn kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko 'skirt' banani hai, toh sabse pehle kaun se measurements lenge?

options.B: Waist aur hip

questions.explanation: Skirt banane ke liye waist aur hip measurements sabse zaroori hain taaki sahi fit aur shape mil sake.

questions.question: Pattern ko 'adjust' karne ki zaroorat kab padti hai?

options.B: Jab customer ke measurements standard size se alag hon

questions.explanation: Pattern adjustment tab zaroori hota hai jab customer ke body measurements standard pattern sizes se deviate karte hain, taaki garment perfect fit ho.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'placket' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Opening (jaise cuffs ya neckline) ko clean finish dena aur fasteners lagane ki jagah provide karna

questions.explanation: Placket ek finished opening hoti hai jo cuffs, neckline ya dress openings par use hoti hai, jahan buttons, snaps ya zippers lagaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Sabse basic 'hem' kya hai?

options.B: Rolled hem

questions.explanation: Double-fold hem sabse basic hem hai jisme fabric edge ko do baar fold karke silai ki jaati hai.

questions.question: 'Buttonhole' banane ke liye kaun sa stitch use hota hai?

options.B: Zigzag stitch (ya specific buttonhole stitch)

questions.explanation: Machine buttonholes zigzag stitch variations ka use karte hain taaki buttonhole ke edges dense aur durable banen.

questions.question: Button attach karte waqt 'shank' kyu banate hain (especially thick fabrics ke liye)?

options.B: Taki buttonhole ke liye jagah ban sake aur fabric flat lay kare

questions.explanation: Shank (dhaage ka ek chhota loop) buttonhole ke liye jagah banata hai, jisse buttonholes ke upar button lagane par fabric flat lay karta hai aur pull nahi karta.

questions.question: 'Zipper' lagane se pehle kya preparation zaroori hai?

options.B: Zipper ko press karna aur opening ko basting ya stitching se secure karna
options.D: Zipper ke teeth ko oil karna

questions.explanation: Zipper ko press karna usko flat karta hai. Opening ko basting ya stitching se secure karne se zipper lagate waqt alignment sahi rehta hai.

questions.question: 'Hook and Eye' fasteners ka kya use hai?

options.A: Main opening ko band karne ke liye
options.B: Small openings jaise waistbands ya necklines ko secure karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hooks and eyes chhote fasteners hote hain jo aksar waistbands, necklines ya other small openings ko secure karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Ek 'Rolled Hem' kaisa dikhta hai?

options.B: Bada aur flat hem

questions.explanation: Rolled hem ek bahut chhota, neat aur gol hem hota hai, jo lightweight fabrics (jaise chiffon, silk) par use hota hai.

questions.question: Garment ko 'final press' karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki woh professional aur finished dikhe

questions.explanation: Final press garment ko crisp, clean aur professional look deta hai, saari wrinkles remove karke.

questions.question: Agar zipper 'jam' ho jaaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usse zor se kholne ki koshish karein
options.B: Us par oil ya wax lagakar dheere se kholne ki koshish karein

questions.explanation: Zipper par pencil lead ya wax lagane se woh smooth ho jaata hai aur jam hone par aasani se khul jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Snaps' ka kya use hai garment mein?

options.B: Lightweight aur invisible closures ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko permanent join karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Snaps (press studs) lightweight closures hote hain jo garments mein invisible ya low-profile fastening ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: 'Hemming tape' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Iron-on adhesive jo hem ko temporary ya permanent secure karta hai

questions.explanation: Hemming tape ek adhesive tape hota hai jo iron ki heat se activate hokar hem ko secure karta hai, bina silai ke.

questions.question: Garment mein 'appliqué' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek fabric piece ko doosre fabric par sil kar design banana

questions.explanation: Appliqué ek technique hai jisme ek fabric piece ko cut karke doosre fabric par sil kar decorative design banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar 'invisible zipper' dikh raha hai, toh kya galti ho sakti hai?

options.A: Zipper foot sahi se use nahi hua
options.B: Fabric ko theek se press nahi kiya

questions.explanation: Invisible zipper ko sahi se lagane ke liye special zipper foot ka use karna zaroori hai, jo zipper ke teeth ke bilkul paas silai karta hai taaki woh chhup jaaye.

questions.question: Kon sa tool 'buttonholes' ko open karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Seam ripper

questions.explanation: Seam ripper buttonholes ko neat aur clean tarike se open karne ke liye use hota hai, bina fabric ko damage kiye.

questions.question: 'Fringe' ya 'tassels' ka kya use hai garment mein?

options.B: Decorative embellishment add karna

questions.explanation: Fringe aur tassels garments mein decorative elements ke roop mein add kiye jaate hain, jo ek stylish aur unique look dete hain.

questions.question: Garment ki 'hemline' adjust karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Poore garment ko phir se silna
options.B: Sirf hem ko khol kar naye length par re-hem karna
options.D: Iron se hem ko chhota karna

questions.explanation: Hemline adjust karne ke liye existing hem ko khol kar, naye length par mark karke aur phir se hem karna hota hai.

questions.question: Agar button baar-baar toot jaata hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Button ko theek se attach nahi kiya gaya ya dhaaga kamzor hai

questions.explanation: Button ka baar-baar tootna is baat ka sanket ho sakta hai ki usko theek se secure nahi kiya gaya tha ya jo dhaaga use kiya gaya tha woh kamzor tha.

questions.question: 'Cuffs' ko finish karne ke liye kaun se fasteners use hote hain?

options.B: Buttons aur buttonholes

questions.explanation: Cuffs ko finish karne ke liye traditionally buttons aur buttonholes use hote hain. Modern designs mein Velcro bhi use ho sakta hai, especially casual wear mein.
